title: #DMCIV
body:
### **Why was the assembly created?**
The assembly was created for optimization and convenience on vanilla servers and for an enjoyable single player game.

### **Who was the inspiration for the build?**
### The assembly was based on the recommended mods for the DMC server (dmc-minecraft.ru).

### **Are there modifications in the build that give an advantage over other players?**
No. The assembly contains only visual and auxiliary mods.

### **How often are you going to update build editions?**
We are going to update build versions almost every month!
